name: rvv-plugin-owned-target-exporter-bundle
title: RVV selected artifact routes through plugin-owned exporter registration
description: Move the bounded selected RVV binary microkernel target artifact exporter group through the generic plugin-owned exporter registration boundary while preserving target-owned RVV semantics and front-door tcrv-translate coverage.
creator: codex
notes: Implemented plugin-owned target artifact exporter bundle registration for the finite RVV selected binary microkernel source/header/object route group. Built-in target exporter registration now receives those selected RVV routes only from enabled rvv-plugin bundles, while default builtin plugin registration still exposes the routes through the generic front door. Focused C++ tests, focused RVV front-door lit tests, git diff --check, archived task validation, and check-tianchenrv passed. No RVV runtime/correctness/performance claim was made.
